top_signals.title: August Marks First Month With No Scheduled Brent Crude Cargoes
top_signals.summary: No cargoes of North Sea Brent crude oil are scheduled to load in August as production steadily declines, traders told Reuters on Tuesday, marking a milestone for the global Dated Brent oil benchmark, which prices over 60% of the world's oil.Brent…
